title: Yuki's Super Silly Science Lab
synopsis: Yuki loves doing science experiments, but her mixtures keep making silly things happen! With help from her diverse group of friends, she learns that even messy experiments can teach us something wonderful about science.

pages.text: Yuki put on her special lab coat. It was way too big for her! The sleeves hung down past her hands. "Today I will be the best scientist ever!" she said. Yuki had black hair in two ponytails and big brown eyes full of excitement.

illustration.description: A young Japanese girl with black ponytails and big brown eyes wearing an oversized white lab coat in a colorful home science lab. Her sleeves are comically long, covering her hands. Test tubes, beakers, and science books fill the background. Bright, cheerful colors with a whimsical Pixar-style look.
illustration.alt: Yuki in an oversized lab coat in her science lab

pages.text: "What should I mix first?" Yuki wondered. She looked at her science table. There were bottles of safe, colorful liquids. There were measuring cups. There was baking soda and vinegar. "I know! I'll make a super fizzy potion!"

illustration.description: A close-up view of Yuki's science table covered with colorful bottles, measuring cups, baking soda box, and vinegar bottle. Rainbow-colored liquids in clear containers catch the light. Yuki's excited face peers over the table with wide, sparkling eyes. Warm, inviting colors in playful storybook style.
illustration.alt: Yuki's colorful science table with various safe experiment materials

pages.text: Yuki poured the baking soda into a big bowl. Then she added the vinegar. WHOOSH! The mixture bubbled up and up! "Oh no!" laughed Yuki. White foam spilled everywhere. It covered her shoes and the floor.

illustration.description: Yuki standing in her lab coat with white foamy mixture exploding upward from a bowl on the table. Her expression is surprised but delighted, with foam covering her shoes and spreading across the colorful floor. Dramatic white foam contrasts with bright background colors in whimsical Pixar style.
illustration.alt: Yuki watching her baking soda and vinegar experiment overflow with foam

pages.text: Just then, her friend Marcus came over. He had curly red hair and freckles. "Wow! What happened here?" he asked. "I made a volcano!" said Yuki. "But I wanted to make a potion." Marcus giggled. "It looks like a snow storm in here!"

illustration.description: A boy with curly red hair and freckles standing in the doorway, looking amazed at the foamy mess. Yuki stands in the middle of white foam with her arms spread wide, grinning. The scene shows a delightful disaster with foam everywhere. Bright, playful colors with expressive character faces.
illustration.alt: Marcus arriving to see Yuki's foamy experiment mess

pages.text: Yuki's friend Zara knocked on the door. She had beautiful dark skin and wore a bright yellow headband. "Can I help with science?" asked Zara. "Yes!" said Yuki. "But be careful. My experiments are very silly today."

illustration.description: A girl with dark skin wearing a bright yellow headband standing at the door, smiling warmly. Behind her, Yuki and Marcus are cleaning up white foam with towels. The lab is colorful but messy. Cheerful, welcoming mood with rich saturated colors and expressive big eyes in Pixar style.
illustration.alt: Zara arriving as Yuki and Marcus clean up the foam

pages.text: "Let's try mixing colors!" said Zara. They got three clear cups. Yuki put red food coloring in one cup. Marcus added blue to another. Zara squeezed yellow into the third cup. "Now let's see what happens when we mix them!"

illustration.description: Three children gathered around a table with three clear cups containing bright red, blue, and yellow colored water. Each child holds a different colored dropper. Their faces show anticipation and excitement. Vibrant primary colors pop against the clean lab background in playful storybook style.
illustration.alt: Yuki, Marcus, and Zara with cups of red, blue, and yellow colored water

pages.text: Yuki mixed red and blue. "It's purple!" she shouted. Marcus mixed blue and yellow. "Look! Green!" he said. Zara mixed red and yellow. "Orange!" she laughed. "We made a rainbow with science!" said Yuki.

illustration.description: Three excited children holding up cups showing purple, green, and orange liquids. Their faces beam with joy and discovery. Colorful droplets and swirls of mixed colors float around them magically. The background glows with rainbow colors in whimsical, celebration-like atmosphere.
illustration.alt: The children celebrating their color-mixing discovery with purple, green, and orange liquids

pages.text: "This is the best science ever!" said Marcus. "Even when experiments get messy, we learn cool things!" said Zara. Yuki nodded. "My silly science worked! We discovered how to make new colors!" The three friends high-fived with their colorful fingers.

illustration.description: Three diverse children giving each other a group high-five in the center of a colorful science lab. Their hands have different colored stains from the experiments. Big smiles and sparkling eyes show their joy and friendship. Warm, celebratory lighting with rainbow colors reflecting around them in Pixar style.
illustration.alt: Yuki, Marcus, and Zara giving a group high-five with colorful hands

pages.text: Yuki looked at her lab. There was foam on the floor. There were colorful drops on the table. But she felt proud. "I learned that red and blue make purple. And science can be messy and fun!"

illustration.description: Yuki standing proudly in her slightly messy lab, hands on her hips with a big satisfied smile. White foam patches and colorful drops dot the scene around her. Sunlight streams through a window, creating a warm, accomplished mood. Rich colors and expressive character design in playful storybook style.
illustration.alt: Yuki standing proudly in her colorful, slightly messy science lab

pages.text: "Tomorrow we can try more experiments!" said Marcus. "Maybe we can make slime!" said Zara. "Yes!" said Yuki. "I'll be ready with my big lab coat!" The three friends laughed together. Science was the best adventure of all.

illustration.description: The three children walking out of the lab together, arms around each other's shoulders, looking excited about future experiments. The setting sun creates a warm golden glow behind them. Their expressions show friendship and anticipation for more scientific adventures. Heartwarming, optimistic mood with rich sunset colors.
illustration.alt: Yuki, Marcus, and Zara walking together, excited for more science adventures

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What happened when Yuki mixed baking soda and vinegar?
questions.explanation: When baking soda and vinegar mix, they create a chemical reaction that makes bubbling white foam, just like a volcano!

questions.question: What color did red and blue make when mixed together?
questions.explanation: Red and blue are primary colors that mix together to make purple, a secondary color!

questions.question: Who wore a bright yellow headband?
questions.explanation: Zara wore a bright yellow headband and helped with the color-mixing experiment.

questions.question: What did the friends want to make tomorrow?
questions.explanation: Zara suggested they could make slime in their next science experiment!

questions.question: What did Yuki learn from her messy experiments?
choices: Science can be messy and fun
questions.explanation: Yuki learned that even when experiments get messy, they can still be fun and teach us new things!

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence from Yuki's story!

sentences.text: Yuki put on her special _____ coat.
When she mixed baking soda and vinegar, it made white _____.
Red and blue mixed together make _____.
